This '''individual''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After surviving the initial stages of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], this individual went into hiding on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talasea]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], this individual had received [[Jedi training/Legends|instruction]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and had been a member of the Order during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. While their position in the Order and their rank or degree of involvement in the war is lost to history, it is known that they escaped the horrors of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a treacherous order issued by the twisted [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]]' alter ego, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the Republic [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to wipe out the Jedi. With the Order disbanded and the Republic in ashes as the anti-Jedi [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] emerged, this individual fled to the planet [[Talasea]] and took up residence on a sparsely settle continent. Living in a small farming village, this individual's presence was discovered by Sith Lord [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Arriving on planet with a group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], Vader slew all of the villagers for aiding the Jedi in hiding before executing the Jedi.<ref name="XRS" />
